session.assistant:
## Results Summary
`make fast-ci` failed with exit code 2. Here are all the issues found:
### Code Style Issues - Prettier (FAILED)
2 files have formatting issues: - `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/resolve_conflicts_cmd.py` - `tests/commands/pr/test_resolve_conflicts.py`
### Import Sorting - Ruff (FAILED)
1 error found in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/__init__.py`: - **Line 3**: Unsorted or unformatted import block - Issue: `I001` - Import blocks need organization - Fixable with `--fix` option
### Documentation Reference (FAILED)
- `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is out of date - Run `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs` to regenerate

- `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
### Test Results (ALL PASSED)
